title: npm Essential Commands
description: Must-know npm commands for managing Node.js packages and workflows.

entries.label: Install Dependencies
entries.description: Install all dependencies listed in package.json

entries.label: Run Script
entries.description: Execute a script defined in package.json

entries.label: Init Project
entries.description: Create a package.json with default values

entries.label: Publish Package
entries.description: Publish the package to the npm registry

entries.label: Audit Vulnerabilities
entries.description: Check for known security vulnerabilities in deps

entries.label: Check Outdated
entries.description: List packages that have newer versions available

entries.label: Clean Cache
entries.description: Force clear the npm cache to fix install issues

entries.label: Bump Version
entries.description: Bump the package version and create a git tag

entries.label: Link Package
entries.description: Symlink a local package for development testing
